privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for webots_env configure_rgbd_mapping_sensors task by confirming that the Webots simulation world and robot are synthetically generated directly via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected output path, target sensor translation coordinates [0.0, 0.065, 0.0], and Intel RealSense D435 camera specifications (maxRange 10.0, minRange 0.3, depth FOV 1.5184, RGB FOV 1.204, width 640, height 480) correctly match both the explicit task instructions and the verifier logic.
